dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: Let me come with you on a mission.

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: What?

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: What did you just say?

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: What good would it do to bring you along?!

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: You don't even have a weapon yet, and you can't even control your own power!

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: Are you going to attack me again like last time?!

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: I'll just watch; I'll stand back far back and watch you fight.

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: What for?!

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: If that's all, then why don't you just watch me on the monitor here?

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: I want to control it quickly. All the pressure is on you right now, and I'm going to have to keep facing the bugs and get my own blood, so I want to start getting used to it now. Plus, I thought that maybe if I see you in action, it might take away some of my own fear.

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: I won't get in your way! I promise.

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: W-Wait!

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: Hajin? What are you...?

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: You don't even have a weapon! What if you forget all your training? What if you go on another rampage?!

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: You're not even an official Butterfly or anything yet! You can't do anything!

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: I know! That's why I want to do something so that I can be of help later!

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: Okay, fine.

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: What are you doing? Are you coming or what?

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: Oh, o-okay!

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: Maybe it's better this way. This might make him see some sense.

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: What?

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: No, absolutely not!

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: Maehwa, you're not even an official Butterfly yet. You're technically just a civilian! And you don't have a weapon yet either; what if you get hurt? Besides, it's too dangerous for you to use your power right now!

dialogue.speaker: Doctor Seo
dialogue.line: It's okay. If he loses control, I'll just knock him out again. Just one hit and he'll be out cold.

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: Why do you always try to solve everything with violence?

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: Anyway, you can't go, Maehwa! Even if I said yes, Doctor Seo would never let you go!

dialogue.speaker: Doctor Seo
dialogue.line: He can go.

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: W-W-W-Wait, Doctor! Did I hear you right just now? How come?! What?!

dialogue.speaker: Doctor Seo
dialogue.line: I said that Maehwa can accompany Jayeong on her mission, but only unofficially, so make sure that he...

dialogue.speaker: Doctor Seo
dialogue.line: Anyway, I have to go.

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: I can't believe it! How can she let him go?!

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: Does this mean... I can go?

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: It doesn't make any sense to me, and I'm really worried about you. But if Doctor Seo says you can go, then that's that. But you have to promise me to just watch, and make sure you take your sedative with you.

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: I will; don't worry. All right, then.

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: Let's begin the briefing for the mission.

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: The bugs appeared on the street in front of a building in Sinsa. Four people have been injured, but thankfully, no one has died so far. Presently, all civilians have been evacuated. The bugs are ordinary ones. There are three in total, one large bug and two medium-sized ones.

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: Perfect; this will be easy. Now... it's time to start hunting.

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: Stay here and hide. If you get in the way, I'll cut you down first.

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: Wow... that was incredible. She killed two bugs all by herself in a matter of seconds. I wonder if I'll ever be able to do that.

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: Jeez, that scared me!

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: Ugh! I got bug slime all over my hands and feet! Gross! It's so sticky!

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: I didn't know she could move like that. I'd better be careful around her.

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: Why is my cut bleeding? Ah! Did it reopen when Hajin grabbed my arm earlier?!

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: What's gotten into it all of a sudden?

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: I-It's okay! Stay calm. The cut stopped bleeding quickly yesterday. And I have the sedative now!

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: Good. I think that calmed me down. The bleeding has stopped too. I feel fine now.

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: Huh? What the hell? Why is it after me?!

dialogue.speaker: Maehwa
dialogue.line: Ugh!

dialogue.speaker: Jayeong
dialogue.line: I told you. If you get in the way... I'll cut you down first!

summary: Maehwa (also known as Hajin) insists on accompanying Jayeong on a mission to learn to control his powers and overcome his fear, despite Jayeong's strong objections. Doctor Seo eventually permits Maehwa to go unofficially, leading to Jayeong reluctantly agreeing but warning him to stay out of the way. During the mission, Maehwa observes Jayeong fighting bugs and reflects on his own abilities and a mysterious bleeding cut, before being targeted by a bug himself.
